key_problems: Animated greeting cycle is visually polished; but no CTA or path forward for returning users; body background is pure black with gradient circles that are aesthetically strong but offer zero navigation
recommended_improvements: Add a 'Enter' or 'Continue' CTA after animation completes; ensure splash auto-redirects to /home after ~4s with a skip option; add keyboard skip for accessibility

key_problems: Hero is premium: GSAP scroll pin + Framer Motion letter animation + monk image. Strong. CTA 'Start Your Journey' links to /contact (not /signup) - conversion mismatch. Hero text grammatically polished.
recommended_improvements: Fix CTA destination: 'Start Your Journey' should route to /signup not /contact. Add secondary CTA ('Learn More' → #services). Hero lacks social proof (testimonials, trust badges).

key_problems: Stats are hardcoded static numbers (no live data). No visual anchor - stats float without context. Section is brief and transitions abruptly.
recommended_improvements: Add animated counter effect for stat numbers. Include source attribution or 'and growing' text. Tie stats to emotional meaning: '10,000+ lives transformed' rather than raw numbers.

key_problems: Section lacks a clear headline hierarchy. Feature cards exist but without a unifying CTA at section bottom. Intersection observer fade-in is good UX practice.
recommended_improvements: Add a section-level CTA 'Explore All Features →'. Ensure each feature card is focusable and has a unique accessible label.

key_problems: Four service cards (Therapist/Counsellor/Healer/Breathwork) with 'Book Now' / 'Start Now' buttons. Featured card elevates nicely (shadow + translate). BUT: buttons are not actual <button> or <Link> elements - they are divs with no click handler wired. All 'Book Now' buttons are dead.
recommended_improvements: Wire 'Book Now' buttons to /signup or /dashboard/sessions. Convert div-based interactive cards to proper <button> or <Link> elements for keyboard accessibility.

key_problems: Good three-step feature preview (Get A Guided Plan / 1:1 Sessions / Micro Tools). Cards are static image+text. Button labels ('Get Now'/'Book Now'/'Start Now') exist visually but are div-based non-interactive.
recommended_improvements: Convert card buttons to actual interactive elements. Link 'Book Now' to /signup. Add step numbers (1,2,3) to reinforce the 'how it works' narrative.

key_problems: Visually impressive dark chat panel with ambient bot UI. BUT: hardcoded 'Welcome Dhruv Bhai!' text is production-visible placeholder. The 3 quick-action buttons (Help me breathe/Feeling Anxious/Feeling Sad) are visual-only divs with no onClick or routing.
recommended_improvements: Fix hardcoded name. Wire quick-action CTAs to actual SoulBot chat or /signup flow. Add an input field to make the chat demo interactive or remove fake interactivity.

key_problems: Single centered 'Explore Now' button linking to /contact. Weak CTA text. Gradient hover effect is polished. Routing to /contact for a landing CTA is conversion-suboptimal.
recommended_improvements: Change label to 'Start Your Wellness Journey' and route to /signup. Add supporting copy: '14-day free access • No credit card required'. Consider adding a secondary 'Talk to Us' link.

key_problems: Corporate teaser section has good image+text layout. CTA button exists but links to /business page only.
recommended_improvements: Add a direct 'Request a Demo' CTA routing to /business/corporate or a lead form. Corporate section should have distinct visual treatment from consumer sections.

key_problems: Accordion FAQ pattern is accessible and clean. No CTA at FAQ conclusion. FAQ content is static/hardcoded.
recommended_improvements: Add a 'Still have questions? Talk to us →' CTA at FAQ section bottom linking to /contact. Consider dynamic FAQ from CMS in future.

key_problems: Light bg (bg-white) creates good contrast for a wellness brand. Sections: Hero/Stats/VisionMission/Founders/Values. Strong visual storytelling potential. No CTA anywhere on the page - missed opportunity to convert visitors to /signup.
recommended_improvements: Add a 'Join Our Journey' CTA at page bottom. Add practitioner recruitment CTA. VisionMission section needs more visual weight (icons or imagery).

key_problems: Dark bg with warm/cool ambient orbs is visually striking. Form has email+password+show/hide. Good. Google/Apple OAuth buttons exist but are non-functional stubs (console.warn only). Error state renders inline.
recommended_improvements: Remove or clearly label 'Coming soon' on Google/Apple auth buttons. Add 'Forgot Password' link (backend STUB endpoint exists but no frontend route). Password strength indicator would improve security UX.

key_problems: Multi-step flow (welcome→account→astrology→partner) is well-architected. Step indicators visible. BUT: no progress bar visible on first screen. Astrology form asks for birth time + city which may feel invasive without explanation.
recommended_improvements: Add a step progress indicator (1/4) on all signup steps. Add tooltip/explanation for why astrology data is collected. Add 'Skip for now' option for optional fields.

key_problems: Clean dark account creation form. Password strength via zxcvbn is good UX. Google OAuth button is non-functional. Terms/Privacy links present.
recommended_improvements: Wire Google OAuth or remove button. Ensure password strength meter is visible in color-blind-safe palette.

key_problems: Astrology profile step collects birth date/time/place/face image. Face image upload is unexpected and may reduce conversion. 'Unknown birth time' toggle is thoughtful.
recommended_improvements: Make face image optional and explain why it's requested. Add 'Why do we ask this?' info tooltip. Consider moving face image to dashboard profile settings.

key_problems: Premium dark dashboard with time-aware greeting, quick actions (Book Session/Journal/Meditate), SoulConstellationMap widget, TheConfessional, PatternAlerts, HumanMatchCard. Framer Motion stagger animations are polished.
recommended_improvements: Quick action cards are well-designed but 'Book a Session' routes to /dashboard/sessions which has hardcoded mock data. Ensure live data or clearly mark as 'Coming Soon'. Add empty state handling.

key_problems: Mood tracker with 1-10 scale, color coding, tag system, mini trend chart (SVG bars). API-wired. Clean dark aesthetic with accent colors per mood value. Tag chips are interactive.
recommended_improvements: Add week/month toggle for trend view. Mood entry success feedback is toast-only - consider inline animation. Empty state for new users should be warmer/more encouraging.

key_problems: Exceptional design: warm parchment gradient bg, Playfair Display serif font, ruled notebook lines via CSS background-image, mood emoji selector. Paginated entry list with search. API-wired.
recommended_improvements: Add rich text formatting (bold/italic) for journal write view. Consider auto-save draft. Entry list needs better empty state messaging for first-time users.

key_problems: Timer-based meditation with preset durations (5/10/15/20 min). Guided/Unguided/Breathwork type selector. API-wired logging. QuickTimer component is functional.
recommended_improvements: Add guided audio/video content (currently missing). Session type labels are generic. Add breathing visualizer animation for breathwork sessions. History list needs visual mood-entry pairing.

key_problems: Rich UI with upcoming sessions, therapist search/filter, session type badges (video/chat/call). BUT: all data is hardcoded mock arrays - no API call. 'Book Session' modals exist but don't submit to backend.
recommended_improvements: Wire sessions to real API endpoints (currently STUB on backend). Add loading state. Empty state message for users with no booked sessions. 'Book Now' must route to booking flow.

key_problems: Toggle-based settings (Dark Mode/Animations/Notifications/Privacy). API-wired for some settings. Clean card layout with icon+description per setting. 'Export Data' and 'Delete Account' present (GDPR).
recommended_improvements: Dark mode toggle description says 'Keep the obsidian aesthetic (always on)' - if always on, remove the toggle to avoid confusion. Export/Delete flows need confirmation dialogs.

key_problems: Name/email editing, avatar upload, stats display (from /users/dashboard). API-wired. Camera icon for avatar upload is intuitive. Inline editing with check/x controls.
recommended_improvements: Add profile completion percentage indicator. Stats section could link to detailed views. Avatar upload success state needs visual feedback beyond toast.

key_problems: Paginated notification list. Mark-read/Mark-all-read. API-wired. Clean empty state. Notification items show type icon.
recommended_improvements: Add notification grouping by date. Unread count badge in sidebar nav. Push notification prompt for browser permissions.

key_problems: Soul Constellation Map: D3-style canvas with draggable relationship nodes. Unique and differentiated feature. Node detail panel with insights. BUT: entirely local state - no persistence. Data lost on page refresh.
recommended_improvements: Wire to backend API for persistence. Add onboarding tooltip for first use. Empty state for new users needs guidance on how to start adding people.

key_problems: Connections page has UI structure but uses hardcoded mock data arrays throughout. No API call.
recommended_improvements: Wire to real connections/community API. Add empty state with 'Connect with others on similar journeys' CTA. Mock data should be removed or clearly labeled.

key_problems: Rich widget-based layout: scheduled sessions / appointments / completed sessions / pending approvals / client intake. All data is hardcoded mock arrays. Animated line graph for metrics. Real-time-feeling but fully static.
recommended_improvements: Wire all widgets to real API endpoints. Pending approval 'Accept/Ignore' buttons are wired to mock handlers only. Session 'Start Call' button does nothing (no video provider). Add real-time notification badge.

key_problems: Today's sessions list with time slots. Hardcoded mock data.
recommended_improvements: Wire to real therapy sessions API. Add 'Join Call' button that will activate when video is implemented.

key_problems: Client list with search. Hardcoded data.
recommended_improvements: Wire to real /therapy/clients endpoint. Add client profile drill-down.

key_problems: Functional but generic: gradient indigo/purple background with tabbed overview. Uses shadcn Card+Button components. Hardcoded mock kundali data. Logout clears localStorage directly (not AuthContext).
recommended_improvements: Use consistent design system with user dashboard (dark obsidian theme). Wire to real astrology API. Use AuthContext logout() instead of direct localStorage.removeItem.

key_problems: Generic slate-950 background with basic card metrics (hardcoded). Uses shadcn components. No admin-specific design language. Logout clears localStorage directly. No auth middleware on /admin backend routes (CRITICAL security gap).
recommended_improvements: Establish distinct admin visual identity. Wire to real analytics APIs. Fix backend: add requireRole('ADMIN') middleware to all /admin server routes. Use AuthContext logout.

key_problems: Creative 404: large gradient-red 404 number with centered happy face emoji. Search input. Navigation links. BUT: happy face image loads from Figma API URL (external runtime dependency).
recommended_improvements: Replace Figma API URL with local /images/error/happy-face.png. Add 'Go Home' primary CTA button. Search form needs actual search result routing.

key_problems: 15 hardcoded blog posts with category filter and search (client-side). Card grid layout. Featured card layout variation. Author + time display. Clean light background.
recommended_improvements: Add server-side blog API (currently no BlogPost schema). Add pagination for more than 15 posts. Add social sharing buttons on blog cards.

key_problems: Individual blog post template. Hardcoded static content.
recommended_improvements: Wire to dynamic API. Add related posts. Add author bio section. Add social share and comments.

key_problems: Course cards with category filter, search, ratings, pricing in INR. Hardcoded data (12+ courses). Clean light bg layout.
recommended_improvements: Wire to real courses API (no Prisma schema yet). Add enrollment CTA that routes to checkout. Add 'Preview Course' feature.

key_problems: Course detail with curriculum, instructor, reviews. Hardcoded static.
recommended_improvements: Wire to API. Add 'Enroll Now' button that connects to payment flow.

key_problems: Contact form with name/email/phone/message/checkbox. Clean light bg. Pill-shaped inputs are distinctive. BUT: 'Send Request' button has type='button' and no onSubmit handler - form submission is non-functional.
recommended_improvements: Wire form submission to backend API or email service. Change button type to 'submit'. Add loading and success states. Add form validation feedback.

key_problems: Photo collage + job listings with salary ranges. 'Apply' buttons exist but have no routing or onClick handler.
recommended_improvements: Wire Apply buttons to application form or external ATS. Add application form modal or route to /careers/:jobId.

key_problems: Business solutions page with hero, intro, and solution cards. Links to /business/corporate and /business/student-counselling sub-pages.
recommended_improvements: Improve hero CTA: add direct 'Request a Demo' button. Add trust logos (company clients).

key_problems: Strong dark-themed corporate page. Hero + feature cards + CTA section. 'Request A Demo' button exists but is type='button' with no handler - not wired.
recommended_improvements: Wire 'Request A Demo' to contact form or booking modal. Add ROI statistics. Add client testimonials.

key_problems: Student counselling landing with hero, service cards, and demo page variant. Targeted content for schools/universities.
recommended_improvements: Add institutional contact/pricing CTA. Differentiate B2B vs B2C CTAs.

key_problems: Workshop showcase page. Good imagery. Static content.
recommended_improvements: Add registration/interest form. Wire to backend events system when implemented.

key_problems: Mandala animation loading screen with 5.6s auto-navigation to /dashboard. Multilingual greetings. Premium feel.
recommended_improvements: Ensure auto-navigation fallback if JS timer fails. Add accessible progress indicator. Reduce animation duration for reduced-motion preference.
